entry.title: Game Play Design
entry.content:
Designing a level

One of the most important aspects of level design is the placement of objects. Tips to consider

  1. Decide where to put each object , how many of them to use, and what orientation they should have to create a layout.
  2. Make sure that the buildings made sense in the context of the game world and the gameplay. 3.Experiment with different layouts to test the effect on the player experience. Consider things like visibility, accessibility, navigation, interaction, and immersion. The challenge is the player’s navigation. They should be able to see the buildings clearly, reach them easily, move around them smoothly, interact with them meaningfully, and feel immersed in them in a realistic way.
Above is the before pic of one of the sections made for the game.

Once you have the layout done ,share a prototype with other players and testers. Get feedback early to improve design. Players will point out issues that we had overlooked such as collision detection, lighting effects, sound effects, and performance optimization.

Above is the after pic of one of the sections made for the game after taking in the feedback offered by my peers.

This journey is important for us to go through to understand player retention and level design. In my journey,I learned how to balance aesthetics and functionality, how to create a coherent and immersive game world, and how to use feedback and testing to improve . I learned how to use the Roblox platform ,Roblox Studio editor, the Roblox scripting language Lua, the Roblox asset library, and the Roblox community forums while working on this project.

```
entry.summary: Creating a better virtual world in your game

entry.title: Do you want to win the Splendor board game// ..check out tips

link.title: Do you want to win the Splendor board game// ..check out tips

entry.content:
–

Tips for winning Splendor Board Game

Splendor is a board game where players embark on the journey of building a jewelry empire and winning the favor of the noble class. The game involves utilizing development cards, gem tokens and noble tiles. The ultimate goal is to accumulate prestige points as possible by obtaining development cards and impressing nobles to join your cause.

Basic Tips for Playing Splendor

Basic tips to help you get started: To become an expert gem collector you must gather gems (diamond,sapphire,emerald, opal)in order to purchase cards. These cards are essential for acquiring cards, earning points and ultimately acquiring Nobles for additional bonus points. During a player’s turn they have the option to select two gems of the same color if there are at least four of that color remaining. Alternatively they can choose one gem from three colors. Additionally players receive a gem that can be used as any color when reserving a card they are unable or choose not to buy immediately.

Understanding the objective in Splendor; When you first start playing Splendor it’s tempting to prioritize collecting gems and cards to create a gem card engine. The game encourages this approach especially when you’re still learning. However it’s essential not to lose sight of Splendors goal. Despite its simplicity the winner is not determined by who builds the impressive engine; instead it is the player who reaches a minimum of 15 points first

Strategies for Winning at Splendor:

## Strategy 1: Reserve Cards You Want Early On Reserve your desired cards to acquire them before your opponents have a chance. This approach becomes particularly advantageous when you aim to construct a combination centered around colors card types. By reserving a card you remove it from the playing area. Place it in front of yourself preventing your rivals from purchasing it. Additionally reserving a card allows you to hold onto it for use if you currently lack gems to make the purchase.

## Strategy 2: Take 3 Chips in Early Turns During the stages of the game it’s often advisable to opt for acquiring three chips or directly purchasing a card. This approach enables you to swiftly accumulate a collection of gems and grants you flexibility in stages. These chips can be utilized either to acquire cards or to save up for the purchase of a noble tile.

## Strategy 3: Choose Two Colors That You Will Own and Buy Them Up One effective strategy for acquiring the cards you desire and impeding your opponents is to select two colors and purchase them exclusively. By concentrating on obtaining all the cards in those chosen colors, such as blue and green you can accumulate a number of points while simultaneously limiting your opponents access to those colors.

## Strategy 4: Keep Track of Your Opponents’ Cards It’s crucial to keep tabs on your opponents cards. By knowing which cards they are aiming for you can strategically hinder their progress by purchasing those cards before them or reserving them for yourself. Additionally this knowledge allows you to anticipate which nobles they are pursuing and attempt to attract them before your opponents have the chance to do so.

Conclusion

Splendor is a fun starter game for 12 year olds , try these tips to take some wins !!!!!!!!!

–
